task_completion.description: Create a new status label named 'Returned to Lessor' with an 'Archived' behavior.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Status Labels' page in Snipe-IT showing a label named 'Returned to Lessor' with the Type column showing 'Archived'.

task_completion.description: Check in all hardware assets supplied by 'Apple Financial Services'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Hardware/Assets list. Assets with Supplier 'Apple Financial Services' should not have a user assigned in the 'Checkout To' column, or should show a 'Checkout' button instead of 'Checkin'.

task_completion.description: Update the status of all hardware assets supplied by 'Apple Financial Services' to 'Returned to Lessor'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Hardware/Assets list. Assets with Supplier 'Apple Financial Services' should have their Status column showing 'Returned to Lessor'.

task_completion.description: Add 'RMA-99281-RETURN' to the Notes field of all hardware assets supplied by 'Apple Financial Services'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the asset details or edit pages for 'Apple Financial Services' assets. The Notes field should contain 'RMA-99281-RETURN'.

task_completion.description: Do not modify, check in, or add notes to assets from the supplier 'CDW'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Hardware/Assets list. Assets with Supplier 'CDW' should still be checked out, have their original status, and lack the RMA note.

integrity.description: Agent used the Snipe-IT web interface to perform actions.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating the Snipe-IT application in a web browser, not using terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Agent did not modify the database directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there are no terminal windows open showing MySQL, SQLite, or other database commands used to update the assets directly.

integrity.description: Agent genuinely interacted with the application forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent filling out forms (e.g., editing assets, creating status labels) rather than just inspecting elements or editing HTML.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target supplier: 'Apple Financial Services' (4 leased MacBook assets). Ignore supplier: 'CDW' (3 owned MacBook assets). Expected status label: 'Returned to Lessor' with type 'archived'. RMA note: 'RMA-99281-RETURN'.
